prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近三年位次持续后移趋势、20 26年扩招约12.3%的缓解作用、本省考生总数大幅增加带来的竞争加剧、以及学校排名稳定在50-60区间等因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年6687名基础上继续后移。扩招虽缓解 部分压力，但考生总数激增和热门专业吸引力共同推高位次。预测最低位次约7200名，区间6700-7700名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 6243, in 2024 approximately 6396, in 2025 approximately 6687, with a continuous backward shift over the past three years, totaling about 444 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 6687. The provincial science enrollment plan was 125 in 2023, 128 in 2024, 122 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 137, an increase of 15 students (approximately +12.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition slightly, but needs to be assessed in conjunction with changes in the total number of examinees.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking in recent years: 48th in 2021, 58th in 2022, 59th in 2023, 61st in 2024, 54th in 2025, 56th in 2026, with an overall stable ranking in the 50-60 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; no significant negative or positive public opinion events concerning China University of Geosciences (Wuhan) were found in the reputation documents; the university did not enter the top 100 in Douyin popularity rankings, with average short video exposure; no record of enrollment gaps was found in the submission anomaly documents, indicating overall stable application sentiment; however, the university has traditional strengths in geology and geological resources and geological engineering, with high industry recognition for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, etc., are highly recommended hot majors; the university's science enrollment includes popular directions such as computer science, electronic information, automation, etc., which are attractive to examinees; the total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is approximately 238,000 (including uncertain marks); the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, which is cross-provincial enrollment; Xinjiang examinees need to consider regional preferences when studying in central China, and Wuhan, as a central city, has some appeal to northwestern examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift in rankings over the past three years, the easing effect of the approximately 12.3% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province, and the university's stable ranking in the 50-60 range, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 6687. Although the enrollment expansion alleviates some pressure, the surge in examinee numbers and the appeal of popular majors jointly push the ranking higher. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7200, with a range of 6700-7700.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 6700), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (around 7700), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors. The university is a 211-level institution with distinctive geology and mining characteristics, and computer/electronic majors have been popular in recent years; when applying, consider personal interests and employment expectations.

历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking was approximately 1635, in 2024 approximately 1280, and in 2025 approximately 1264. Over the past three years, the ranking has consistently moved forward, with a cumulative advance of about 371 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1264. This significant reduction theoretically intensifies competition and moves the ranking forward (decreasing the number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been stable in the 50-60 range in recent years, ranking 56th in 2026, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Although liberal arts majors are not its traditional strength, the 211 platform still attracts liberal arts students. No significant public opinion incidents were found in the reputation file. Its Douyin popularity ranking did not enter the top 100. No abnormal admission records were found, and overall admission public opinion is stable. The fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include specific ratings for this university. The liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include Law, Administrative Management, Ideological and Political Education, Radio and Television, English, and Economics, among which Law has been a popular major in recent years.

专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows Law as recommended (relatively popular), Chinese Language/Literature as recommended, and Teacher Training/Education as differentiated and wait-and-see. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of rankings over the past three years, the intensifying effect of a significant enrollment reduction of approximately 41.7% in 2026, the competitive pressure from a substantial increase in the total number of candidates in the province, and the high popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to move forward from the 2025 ranking of 1264. The enrollment reduction is the main driving factor for the forward ranking, and the increase in candidates further strengthens this direction. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 960, with a range of 760 to 1160.
